No dynamic or external data sources are involved.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** The functions are standard for deploying/interacting with a contract. No untrusted input flows into sensitive sinks.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No signs of obfuscation, secrets, or malicious code.
